request.description:
# **Bug description:**

Sending empte strings in fields "checkin" and "checkout" via PATCH method that includes object:

### _Payload sent_

`"bookingdates":{"checkin":"","checkout":""}`

### _Expected result_

Expect server to return status code 400 - Bad request.

### _Actual result_

However, server returns _200 OK_ and saves corrupt data with NaNs:  
`"bookingdates": { "checkin": "0NaN-aN-aN", "checkout": "0NaN-aN-aN" }`
